programmes.show_description: Snap up the best offers at QVC before they're gone! We've got great savings on fashion, beauty, home and more, including items that won't be around for long.
Update your wardrobe with the latest fashion designs from Denim & Co. including trend-led pieces with timeless style.
Update your winter wardrobe with beautiful designs by Helene Berman. Championing the importance of quintessentially British-made clothing, the collections are trend driven, classic and feminine.

Tune in to see Shark's homecare solutions, featuring innovative technology designed to make your cleaning routine easier.
Snap up the best offers at QVC before they're gone! We've got great savings on fashion, beauty, home and more, including items that won't be around for long.
Vacuum your home with help from the iconic and much-loved British brand Dyson. We will be showcasing unique packages with added accessories, as well as discovering Dyson's new innovative technology.
Join our resident expert Richard Jackson as he shares his top tips for the coming season, with exciting new plant varieties alongside classic blooms and shrubs.

programmes.show_name: Bedding in Time for the Spring
programmes.show_description: Bedding in Time for the Spring.
Want to know what's hot in the world of electronics? Tune in and explore the latest innovations in TVs, computers, tablets, cameras and more from the leading brands you know and trust.
Elevate your home and garden with Abode! Discover stylish decor, clever solutions, and inspiring ideas to create a space you'll love, inside and out.
Treat yourself to a wardrobe refresh with the Most Wanted Spring Fashion. Tune in and discover gorgeous colours, quality fabrics, top-notch advice, and so much more!
Snap up the best offers at QVC before they're gone! We've got great savings on fashion, beauty, home and more, including items that won't be around for long.
Bring your spring garden to life with Garden Stories! Discover inspiring plants, tips, and decor to refresh your outdoor space and spark your gardening creativity.
Revive your garden this spring with Wet & Forget! Discover easy solutions for cleaning and refreshing outdoor spaces, making your garden shine all season.
Tune in to see Shark's homecare solutions, featuring innovative technology designed to make your cleaning routine easier.
Transform your garden with Plants2Gardens, now on 5 Easy Pay! Discover beautiful plants and expert advice to inspire your outdoor space at QVC.
Snap up the best offers at QVC before they're gone! We've got great savings on fashion, beauty, home and more, including items that won't be around for long.
Discover a curated selection of designer handbags, as we showcase brands such as Osprey, Radley, Paul Costelloe and Aimee Kestenberg among others.
Upgrade your gardening with Webb tools at 20% off! Discover reliable, innovative equipment to make outdoor tasks easier and inspire your spring garden at QVC.
Take the elbow grease out of household chores with our superb selection of products for a shipshape home - featuring the iconic British brand Dyson.
Brighten your home and garden with our Living with the Lights show. Discover creative lighting ideas to transform your space, indoors and out, for a warm, inviting glow all year round.
